derivation_notes.levid_location: VALUE field (8-byte LE uint64) of each index entry
derivation_notes.sort_semantics: pubkey bytes compared by memcmp (same for both golpe and memcmp); created_at compared NUMERICALLY (golpe LE uint64, not memcmp)

adversarial_demonstration.pair: levIds [5,6] at ts=1700000255 vs levIds [7,8] at ts=1700000256 (same pubkey=79be...)

derivation_notes.tie_resolution: Events with same (pubkey, created_at) key are sorted by levId ascending (MDB_DUPSORT + MDB_INTEGERDUP value ordering)

ordering_groups.note: 3 events; same pubkey+ts; ordered by levId
